goal: Create a business plan for {business_idea} targeting {target_market}

steps.prompt: Research the market for {business_idea} targeting {target_market}. Find: total addressable market size, key competitors and their positioning, recent trends and growth rates, regulatory landscape, and any relevant market timing catalysts. Cite sources throughout.

Define target customer personas for {business_idea} in the {target_market} market. Use the market research at market-research.md as input. Develop 2-3 detailed personas with demographics, pain points, current solutions, buying triggers, and willingness to pay. Map the customer journey from awareness to purchase.

Write a comprehensive business plan for {business_idea} targeting {target_market}. Use market-research.md and personas.md as your primary inputs. Cover: executive summary, problem and solution, market analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM), business model and unit economics, competitive landscape, go-to-market strategy, team section (leave as placeholder), and funding ask (leave as placeholder). Flag wherever the founder must insert real data.

checkpoint_config.message: Review business-plan-draft.md. Fill in any flagged placeholders, then approve to proceed to financial projections.

steps.prompt: Build 3-year financial projections for {business_idea}. Use the business model and unit economics from business-plan-draft.md. Create: revenue model with explicit assumptions, P&L summary by quarter for year 1 and annually for years 2-3, cash flow waterfall, headcount plan, and break-even analysis. Show the inflection point where the business becomes contribution-margin positive.

Review the complete business plan package: business-plan-draft.md and financial-projections.md. Identify gaps, weak assumptions, unsupported claims, missing competitive responses, and any sections where the investor pitch will lose credibility. Be direct and prioritize the top 5-7 issues by severity.

checkpoint_config.message: Review critique.md and address any critical gaps in the plan. Approve when the business plan is ready for distribution.
